upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SamadamAdivAkyavihitAcCamadamAderAnantaryamaTaSabdArTa iti SaNkarAcAryE nirawaNki' (sarvada0 saM0 pAta0) nirawaNkiH=aByaDAyi

'gumPitEruSanasA suBAzitEryasya hAwakaviwaNkamaNkitam' (nE0 1824) viwaNkaH kapotapAlikA kapotapAlikAyAM tu viwaNkaM punnapuMsakam ityamaraH waNkaH pAzARadAraRo Bavati vipUrvastu sa eva kapotapAlikAM brUta ityaho upasargamAhAtmyam
'saBAraRyaviwaNkavAn' (BA0 Adi0 188) BAratadruma iti viSizyate viwaNkAH pakzyupaveSanasTAnAni
'romotsavo mama yadaNGriviwaNkitAyAH' (BA0 pu0 11635) viwaNkitA=badDA saMspfzwA alaNkftA
